duplicates.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Small Business Loan Default Signals Credit Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly surge in google trends for small business loan default signals rising local economic stress

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Small Business Loan Default Signals Credit Stress
idea.thesis: Rising interest in small business loan defaults can presage local economic stress and impact financial sector sentiment. Higher default risk pressures financial institutions' earnings and credit availability.
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLF when weekly Google Trends for 'small business loan default' rises more than 25% week-over-week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLF when weekly Google Trends for 'small business loan default' rises more than 25% week-over-week Exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if trend reverts below 10% weekly increase
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Small business credit stress tends to fluctuate regularly with economic cycles.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'small business loan default' signals credit stress
schema.behavior: Rising interest in small business loan defaults can presage local economic stress and impact financial sector sentiment.

market_impact.rationale: Higher default risk pressures financial institutions' earnings and credit availability.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when weekly Google Trends for 'small business loan default' rises more than 25% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if trend reverts below 10% weekly increase

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Small business credit stress tends to fluctuate regularly with economic cycles.

duplicates.title: Weekly Increase In Google Trends For Truck Driver Shortage Signals Freight Labor Constraints

duplicate_of.matched_title: weekly increase in google trends for truck driver shortage signals freight sector labor pressure

idea.title: Weekly Increase In Google Trends For Truck Driver Shortage Signals Freight Labor Constraints
idea.thesis: Rising attention to truck driver shortages signals tightening freight labor markets and possible supply chain disruptions. Freight and industrial sectors suffer higher costs and delays from labor shortages.
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLI when weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises more than 20% week-over-week
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI when weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises more than 20% week-over-week Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when weekly increase falls below 10%
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor shortages in freight recur frequently causing weekly search volume changes.

schema.idea: Weekly increase in Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' signals freight labor constraints
schema.behavior: Rising attention to truck driver shortages signals tightening freight labor markets and possible supply chain disruptions.

market_impact.rationale: Freight and industrial sectors suffer higher costs and delays from labor shortages.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises more than 20% week-over-week
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when weekly increase falls below 10%

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor shortages in freight recur frequently causing weekly search volume changes.

duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Roadside Assistance Signals Auto Sector Stress

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency roadside assistance searches signals consumer stress

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Roadside Assistance Signals Auto Sector Stress
idea.thesis: Short-term surges in emergency roadside help searches reflect increased vehicle issues and repair needs. Auto repair and service sectors see increased demand during spikes in roadside assistance interest.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLY when daily 'emergency roadside assistance' searches exceed 2.5 std deviations above 30-day mean
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLY when daily 'emergency roadside assistance' searches exceed 2.5 std deviations above 30-day mean Exit: Exit after 5 days or when search volume drops below 1 std deviation
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle breakdown issues cause frequent daily search spikes.

schema.idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'emergency roadside assistance' signals auto sector stress
schema.behavior: Short-term surges in emergency roadside help searches reflect increased vehicle issues and repair needs.

market_impact.rationale: Auto repair and service sectors see increased demand during spikes in roadside assistance interest.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLY when daily 'emergency roadside assistance' searches exceed 2.5 std deviations above 30-day mean
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 days or when search volume drops below 1 std deviation

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle breakdown issues cause frequent daily search spikes.

duplicates.title: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Emergency Hvac Repair Signals Consumer Home Stress In Energy Sector

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily jump in google trends for emergency hvac repair signals consumer home repair stress

idea.title: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Emergency Hvac Repair Signals Consumer Home Stress In Energy Sector
idea.thesis: Spikes in emergency HVAC repair searches indicate acute home maintenance needs often linked to weather changes. Consumer staples and home-related services see demand rise during HVAC repair surges.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLP when daily searches for 'emergency HVAC repair' exceed 2 std deviations above 30-day mean
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLP when daily searches for 'emergency HVAC repair' exceed 2 std deviations above 30-day mean Exit: Exit after 5 days or when searches fall below 1 std deviation
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: HVAC emergencies surge frequently due to weather and equipment failures.

schema.idea: Daily jump in Google Trends for 'emergency HVAC repair' signals consumer home stress in energy sector
schema.behavior: Spikes in emergency HVAC repair searches indicate acute home maintenance needs often linked to weather changes.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples and home-related services see demand rise during HVAC repair surges.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLP when daily searches for 'emergency HVAC repair' exceed 2 std deviations above 30-day mean
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 days or when searches fall below 1 std deviation

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: HVAC emergencies surge frequently due to weather and equipment failures.
